title: Change text shown for links in text
excerpt: Give the ability to change the text shown for links pasted into updates, workdocs, etc. I was a bit surprised this isn’t possible since this was the first time I have ever not been able to change the text being shown on …

posts.author: zsmith (Zach Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Give the ability to change the text shown for links pasted into updates, workdocs, etc. I was a bit surprised this isn’t possible since this was the first time I have ever not been able to change the text being shown on a link.

posts.author: rargenbright (Becca Argenbright)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, this would be extremely helpful, and it’s a bit surprising it’s so cumbersome. I’d add a suggestion: give users the option to display additional info about the item they’re linking if it’s something within monday.com. For example, if I want to link to a monday.com task in a monday.com doc that’s used for shared notes, there might be instances where it’d be helpful for the current status of the task to appear alongside the link to the task itself.
